titleStmt.title: SII 9.675: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 675. (A.R. No. 387 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TANK IN THE HARIHARA TEMPLE AT KUMBHAKASI, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1485, Dundubhi, Śrāvaṇa, śu. 1, Gu[ruvāra], corresponding to A.D. 1562 July 2 (Adhika-Śrāvaṇa), Thursday, in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya. It records that Kaleya Elapa-Voḍeya who was ruling over the province of Bārkūru-rājya under the orders of Sadāśivarāya-Nāyaka of Keḷadi who had been appointed governor of the Tuḷu-rājya by Rāmarāja-Veṅkaṭādrirāja-Mahā-arasu made tax-free those plots of land which Mahābalaliṅga-sēnabōva granted to the chhatra in the maṭha attached to the temples of Umāmahēśvara and Lakshmīnārāyaṇadēva in Kumbhakāśi. The gift was made for the prosperity of the king, under the orders of Sadāśivarāya-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdra cāmaracāravē . trayilōkyanāgarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbha
vē [.] svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanasakhavaruśa 1485 neya vartamāna duṁdubhisaṁvatsa
rada śrāvaṇa śu 1 gulu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratapa śrivīrasa
dāśivamahārāyaru vijeyanagariya siṁhāsanadali sukhasa(ṁ)kathāvinōdadiṁda
duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipālaneyāgi sakalava(ṁ)rnadhar(ṁ)māśramagaḷanu pratipāli
suva kāladalu rāmarāja veṁkaṭādrirāja mahāarasugaḷu keḷadiya sadāśivarā
yanāyakarige tuḷurājyavanu pālisi Ā sadāśivarāyanāyakaru bārakūru rājyava
nu kaleya yalapavoḍeyarige pālisi Ā yelapavoḍeyaru bārakūra siṁhasanadali
kuḷitu rājyavanāḷutiha kāladalu śrīsadāśivarāyamahārāyarige śatrukṣa
ya mitrōrjita ĀyurārōgyaĀyiśvariyābhiUradhiyāgabēkeṁdu keḷadi
ya sadāśivarāyanāyakaĀyyanavare nirūpadiṁda kaleya yelapavoḍeya
ru sadāśivarāyanāyakarige Anēkābhyudayavāgabēkeṁdu cōḷiyakēriya mahā
balaliṁgasēnabōvage koṭa dānasāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare nīnu kuṁbhāsiyali kaṭi
sta Umāmahēśvara lakṣmīnārāyaṇadēvara maṭada chatrake nīnu biṭa bāḷu Ārama
neya bhaṁḍāravāda kōṭīśvara gramadoḷage gōpāḍiya Ūralli nīnu Āṁṇahattāra
kayya mūlava koṁḍu jaṁnada hadiya bāḷu hēriya vōṇiyiṁda paḍuvalu kēśa
ṇana makaḷa gaḍiya vōṇiyiṁda baḍagalu nariya guḍe paḍu maneya hebāru haravari
daṁnyara yī nālkugaḍiya muḍalu keḍariya ceṭiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī catu
ssīmeyali bittuva gade mu 15 mane ṭhāū kere saha mattaṁ sikereya ba
yalu vāsudēvaūpādhya kṛṣṇaupādhyara gaḍiya paḍuvalu muḍyana makaḷu
dhaṁnyaru Āṁṇahatāra yī mūru gaḍiya baḍagalu samudradiṁda mūḍalu
siriyaṇa madhyasta mūḍamanaya hebāru paḍuvamaneya hatthāra �yo mūru
gaḍiya teṁkalu halau gade mu 11 mattaṁ hēriya vōṇiya paḍuva
lu paḍuvamaneya hattāragaḍiya baḍagalu bāḷanamane ṭhāvina mūḍalu Ā
ṁṇahatāra gaḍiya taṁkalu gade mu 1 . 0 Āṁtu halau gadeyu kū
ḍi bituva mu 27 . 0 gadeyoḷage tērina bāḷu mu 22 ... 0 ge baṁda terū
kālake kuḷa ga 15 nu niṁna maṭada chatrake sarvvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi sahira(ṁ)ṇyō
dakadānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkastāyiyāgi bāḷuvaṁtāgi dhā
reyaneradu koṭeU mahabalaliṁgasēnabōvanu Āṁṇahatāra kayya mū
lava koṁḍa yogadayoḷagaṇa kāhina bāḷu gade mu 4 ... 0 Ubhayaṁ
bituva bāḷu mu 27 . 0 gadege Āki mu 56 . mattaṁ mahabalaliṁga
sēnabōvaru chatrake biṭadu neraṁ baḷiyalu Āṁṇahebārana kayya mūla
va koṁḍu jaṁnamane sarvvaśva naḍava vōṇiyaṁdaṁ baḍagalu yilliUḷama
ne maneṭhāu maneyabaḍā malagade gōpināthahebārana gaḍiya te
ṁkalu gade mu . 5 sōmayyana gaḍiya paḍuvalu gōpināthahebāra
na gaḍiya muḍalu mu . 0 maṇigārakēriya halara gaḍiya paḍuvalu
Ā halara gaḍiya mūḍalu yeraḍu gadeyu koḍi mu 1 hā 5 nāra
siṁhahebārana gaḍiya paḍuvalu voḍeyara gaḍiyu mūḍalu mā ...
purāṇikara gaḍiya paḍuvalu voḍeyara gaḍiya mūḍalu gade mu . 0
paḍuva bayalu kaṁḍikada gaḍiya paḍuvalu voḍeyara gaḍiya mūḍa
lu mu ... 0 makki kereya mūḍalu voḍeyara gaḍiya paḍuvalu mu 0 . 0
Āṁtu halau gade mu 4 yi bāḷige Āki mu 10 yi jaṁnake baṁ
da kaṭu taru Uḍugare jaṁna varttane saha gaṭi ga 1Ø0 mattaṁ kōṇi
na Urinali mahabalaliṁgasēnabōvaru kaḍariya śaṁkarahebārana jaṁ
namane sarvasva bituva halau gadeyu kūḍi mu 11 nu Āruvāravāgi
barasikoṁḍu koṭa varaha ga 25 ke hoṁna baḍiyu Āki mu 5Ø0
yi bāḷa Ārtta baṁdaru Uratibaṁdarū dēvara chatrake Āṁtu ga 1Ø0
Āki mu 72 ge maṭada Ā ṭilavagi mu 18 chatra Uṁba brahmaṇara
jana dina 1 ke 6 maṁdige Akki mu 54 mattaṁ halaru maṭake biṭa bāḷu ta
kaṭiyalu cheṁnaṭina mane kēśava chatrana gaḍiya paḍuvalu hiriyavō
ṇiya baḍagalu naḍava vōṇiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu maṇigārakēriya maṭada bā
ḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi gaḍiyalu maneṭāu mallagade mu 1Ø0 chenāṭina paḍu
va bayalu naḍava vōṇiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kāludāriyiṁda baḍagalu ho
ḷeyiṁda mūḍalu kēśava chatrana gaḍi kere Aṁṇa goṭi �yo gaḍiya teṁkalu
halau gadeya mu 6Ø0 vayidyāra mane vōṇiyiṁdaṁ paḍavalu kēśavachatrada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu gade mu 2Ø0 muḍilara gaḍiya paḍuvalu kereya mūḍalu gade mu 1 Āṇagōṭa
na makaḷa gaḍiya paḍuvalu Āṁṇamagōṭana gaḍiya mūḍalu gade mu ... 0 kāludāriya teṁkalu
paḍumaneya hatara gaḍiya baḍagalu mu . 0 hiriyōṇiya teṁkalu huratana gaḍiya
baḍagalu gade mu 1 Āṁtu halau gade mu 13Ø0 ge baṁda teru mu 3 ... 0 hala
ru taṁma pakūūradali biṭa kāṭiga 8 �yo bāḷu sarvamānya �yo bāḷa gandapaṭe
ya haṇa kaḷadu gēṇi mu 26 Ākiyali śāṁtiya Āḍigaḷige mu 24 kārtika pujege
mu 2 mata halaru hamrutapaḍige mābalaliṁgasēnavaviga nārāyaṇasēnabōvage dā
reyaneredu koṭaru kaṭugereyoḷage jaṁnamane sarvvaśa baḍābayalu sāliṁda paḍuvalu
harivasāliṁda baḍagalu hesavinaguḍiya bēliyiṁda mūḍalu gojaraṭa baḷiya
vara geḍiya teṁkalu yī gaḍiyalu maneṭāu bayalu maki meke saha gade mu 43 mū
ḍa bayalu haravariya maneṭāvu bayalu mu 3 ... 0 kereya koḷake gade mu 6 ... 0 teṁka ba
yalu maneṭāu bayalu maki meke saha gade mū 26 . 0 Āṁtu halau gadeyu kū
ḍi mu 80 ge baṁda teru 2 . 0 geriya voḍeyarige mu 41 kāla 1 ke kuḷa gaviṁ Ø1 kaṭu
gereya dēvarige dēvaśaku Aki mu 60 Ø va kaḷadu suddhādāyadalu naḍava Ākki mu 50
maṇaūra teṁka hāśe yiḍura koḷakeya tārugramaṇi Āṁṇahebāraḷu biṭaṇa haṁ
deyara gaḍiya paḍuvalu hariya huruḷu taṁna gaḍiya baḍagalu samudradiṁ muḍa
lu Āraseṭiya māliṁgana gaḍiya teṁkalu bituva gade mu 2 �yo bāḷa sarvamanya
vāgi maṇaūra jaṁnikāḍu koḍuvanu Āṁtu maṇaura kaṭugareya bāḷa Ā
kiyanu Āmrutapaḍige halaru koṭadu mataṁ maṇaura jaṁni naṁdādīvige dhāre
yaneredu koṭadu Ānemāvinahāḷiyoḷage biṭa kaḷa voḷage māḍu habucuma
yya bituva bāḷa mēle kaṭuteru ga Ø 1 kaṁḍikada hāḷiyali naraseṭiya beṁma
ṇa bituvadu Āreya makiya mēle kaṭuteru ga Ø 1 Ubhayaṁ ga 1 ¥ 2 neraṁbaḷi saha
Āṁtu ga 2 Ø 2 ge yeraḍu naṁdādīptige yī dharṁmake Ārobbaru tappidare vā
raṇāsiyali sāvira kavileyanu koṁda pāpake hōharu . dānapālanayō
rmardhyē dānāt śrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāt svargamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padu .
Digital edition of SII 9.675 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
